title: KinkList Builder
lead: The list is generated from text, keeps choices inside the URL, and can export the result as an image or text.
configUpdated: Config updated. Answers were reset for the new structure.
boardText: Choose interest level for each item and each column.
noResults: No results found. Try changing the search query.
exportPromptName: Enter a name for the PNG export
exportFilledOnly: PNG includes answered items only for a more compact layout.
exportAllItems: No answers yet, so PNG includes the full list.
